He stays on top of everything and takes care to make sure everything stays on schedule.

If you have ever closed on a buy and sale at the same time, you know how stressful and difficult it can be to line everything up just right. Alex made sure that both our recent sale and purchase stayed on track.
It was an absolute pleasure to work with Greg! Very professional, knowledgeable and made our closing happen on the day he said it would.

Greg is a really nice guy that helped make our home buying process go as smoothly as possible! Closing happened ON closing day and we couldn't be happier with the attorney we pick! Thanks Greg! Highly recommend!

Absolutely horrible experience, zero accountability, lied about he homeowner's policy insurance payment. Come to know Greg got fired from the company he represented since it was a consistent behavior. Total scam!

Greg and his entire team were amazing throughout our home buying process. Especially considering we were purchasing from out of state and during the pandemic. They have been great following the sale with any questions we have had. They are our go to resource for anything legal. Truly great people.
Greg Scicchitano is my real estate attorney of choice. He is knowledgeable, caring and responsive. I recommend him to my clients and friends.

Update: please take note that most of the positive reviews were bartered for. Anytime a bad review comes in they ask a favor from someone and try to keep the reviews balanced. This is a conflict of interest. In any case, the review from Gwen McDonald, well she is actually a real estate broker and failed to disclose that in her review. Read the reviews, but be very wary of the “positive, glowing reviews” within the past two years.

I am unsure how anyone works with this law firm unless they like to be ignored and gaslit. I recently closed on a home in CNY and the only headache in the entire transaction was dealing with this office, and Greg in particular. I am completely aware that they are a small office with probably a handful of people, but they truly need to re-examine their customer service and communication skills. All of them. In the entire transaction my husband & I received probably 3 email responses from Greg. We were not physically able to be present for the transaction, and maybe this is why they seemed to feel a little different about us. That’s my opinion.

Days would pass by where we’d wait on some sort of call back or email - ANYTHING - from this office, only having to get our realtor to push their buttons. We were referred to this firm by Paragon Loans. Paragon was completely fine and I’d work with again, but Scicchitano Law? I wouldn’t want my worst enemy wasting their time here.

For something as important and expensive as purchasing a home (especially for the very first time during a pandemic nonetheless) you would think they would put my mind at ease about the transaction. But everyday leading up to (and even after!) the closing date, we were so stressed out, headaches galore. No communication what so ever. Eventually even Greg’s paralegal stopped responding to us.

Seriously, if you are recommended this firm at all - for any reason - look elsewhere. No one needs that kind of mishandling and stress in their lives. I wish I would have dropped them and went with someone else - no matter the price. Lesson learned.
Great, responsive law firm for Real Estate transactions.  At least that is the area of expertise that I deal with them on.

Greg and his team got us closed on our home but it was like pulling teeth the entire time; Calls and voicemails often went unanswered, and email replies were sporadic. Many of the issues and concerns we had prior to closing could have been addressed easily if communications were better.
Very flexible and helpful.

Used  scicchitano law for the closing of my house, and it was an absolute breeze! Also, any questions I had were answered professionally! Would recommend to anyone looking for an attorney to close on a house!
This law firm assisted me in closing on my house recently. They were courteous and professional, and the experience was quick and painless.
Greg and Kelly were great to work with! They handled the purchase of our home with professionalism and ease.  Highly recommended!

While selling & buying at the same time, my stress level was high - Greg & Kelly were understanding, always pleasant & prompt in responding to any questions I had during the closing process for both homes. They made the process for us smooth & were efficient in the process of doing so.  Highly recommended!
Scicchitano Law was great to work with. They are efficient , quick , organized and very responsive. This made the buying and selling of houses a breeze!

It was great working with Greg and Kelly - I'd give them ten stars if I could.  I was the buyers' real estate agent - Kelly always responded to my e-mails and calls, got answers right away and was updated by Greg weekly. I have been under the care of multiple MD professionals that claim my disability and disease is from abuse sustained from Betsy not protecting me. I was also told from a medical counselor at mental health that people can be paralyzed from trauma. My children waited 10 months for child support. With two police reports from State Police, and County Police for break ins. I was told from 4 medical officials that Betsy was cruel, inhuman and used unethical treatment. And Vera House questioned if my ex paid her off! My understanding is that most women like me, kill themselves because the pain is unbearable and will never go away! As a masters degree holder and PhD hopeful, I am now going through the permanent disability process! The state and federal government have received documentation of the lack of Ms Barkers ethical side!!!! I am now seeking resolve from a neurologist.... extreme stress can cause stroke, and ptsd can rewire the brain and cause a brain injury, and MS can cause brain lesions! Yes, Ms Baker is deemed an abuser by all the medical professions that I have seen! So far I was told that I can’t have restraining order because it’s joint custody, give up custody of my kids and move out of state, and now currently working with a forensic counselor.... and it appears permanent disability in my situation will be inevitable! I don’t think Betsy had the right tools to deal with situation that forensics experts now have to clean up! A nationally accredited psy D, hospital team, disease specialist, and now a neurologist! I would be greatful for a diagnosis of MS over abuse that sustained brain injury or stroke! I was born and raised in this area and worked at Syracuse City Schools, and abused by a team of lawyers and my ex husband! I only hope it’s disease... to be disable from abuse is almost too much to process! I’m not exactly sure who’s heart aches more at the doctors offices... mine or the medical professionals! I wouldn’t recommend her on account she thinks food falls from the sky! Fearful it was my dark skin that made her so cruel to me! Nonetheless, I wrote a letter to the judge last year to give him the WIC documentation for my 3 year old son... from a man that made 140,000.00 and year and money from his dead mother, he was unable to feed the baby of his family! When a forensic teams sees a man that drain the family bank account 2 months after his mother’s death, takes about the maximum amount in loans, leaves to file for custody and leaves me whirling in the wind in fright, not one lawyer questions his inability to feed his children. But would questioned everything I did. In the mental health world, that’s significant cause for concern! I’m not afraid to share my story! I’m afraid these lawyers will get away will fraud, malicious intent to cause harm, and financial distress to either a diseased women or crippled a women! I’m thankful for the medical professionals to value the lives of their patients! Because the lawyers don’t! Not bitter, and not revengeful, profoundly sad.... a community member that raised scholarships for children, raised money at local churches, and OPWDD board mentee, is unbearably damaged because my voice never once counted!!!!

When we did get her to a meeting she repeatedly asked for (and billed) information that had already been given to her. She was good friends with the opposing counsel and the only activity our case got was when he would tell her what to do. Not saying this because we didn't get the results we wanted. Saying that we never felt she cared, did the work, or was knowledgeable. We looked into filling a complaint with the bar and would have if she hadn't taken all our money. She gave the same story up front as on her web site about caring, personal attention and experience - don't listen.

My wife and I hired Ms. Barker to handle a child custody case.  We live in another state.  We paid Ms. Barker a $1500 retainer and for the first part of our case she did a fine job.  Our bills from her office have always been paid timely.  However, there has been a glitch with our child support payments and we cannot get Ms. Barker's to return any calls to us.  We have even gone so far as to file our own paperwork to have the case return to court.  We know that she is still seen regularly in the child support court.  But she WILL NOT return our calls and now we must find another attorney and start this process again.  Please hire her with caution!

I thought Catalano Law was the way to go for my daughters accident. Well I guess I wrong.. I barely even speak to the attorney about the case. The other guys insurance adjuster even said he hasn't been in contact with him for weeks. It was clearly the other person's fault. Ran her half over with his jeep! Obviously he couldn't or didn't even try to get her anything for her pain and suffering. He could of at least had the courtesy to call me and tell me there is nothing he can or wants to continue with for whatever reason Instead of just not contacting me at all....not saying Catalano is a bad firm but it was for me..

Well here's part 2 of my experience with this law firm. So just finally received the settlement check and was a lot less than what i was told i was going to receive. So i called and this was what was told to me.

These are extra fees for documentation that i could have gotten for him for free and im pretty sure as a lawyer he would know this. I also was told that I would get clear transpareny. I was not aware of any such fees( that again) could of been retrieved for no cost. If this was brought to my attention I would have taken care of the documentation he needed. Why would anyone want to pay an extra fee(which wasn't  all that cheap) compared to what i actually received is beyond me.   There is also another big reason why i should have never gone to this agency but i wont even  get in to that. Ill just have be sure i don't use this firm again. Maybe they dropped off as individuals when they split up i  dont know but my experience wasn't that great ... I don't like reviews but this one hit me differently.... If your needing a lawyer please sure make sure you ask about all the hidden fees.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Steve Kazaka, Thank you for sharing your feedback. Our team values all clients and we always strive to provide the best experience possible. Please contact us at +1 315-888-3705. We would appreciate the opportunity to speak with you and rectify the situation.

reviews.text:
On January 10th 2024 at 10-11 In the morning, I was involved in a really bad car accident in victory at the caution light at the time. A vehicle with a red light on my right pulled out in front of me causing me to T-bone them at 50mph. The other vehicle and I both ended up in the hospital, me with injuries to my neck, back, right hand, And right hip. My injuries a the total loss of my vehicle put me out of work, with my injuries I had to undergo pain management and physical therapy intake, muscle relaxant, and pain medication to this day.
A day or two after my accident, I start looking into lawyers to take my case, Most of them wanted me to come in and fill out paperwork, which was really difficult for me to move around after the accident. A friend of mine gave me a number for Catalano law and I gave them a call and they scheduled an appointment to come and see me to fill out paperwork. Later that week, Catalano team me up with my lawyer, Mellissa Murphy who help me out 100% through my claim. Since I have mobility troubles. A lot of our conversations were through the phone and email, I made sure to keep in touch and let her know of the situation I was in and handover any paperwork that will help her with the case. Side note, It helped that she also been through the same situation that I’ve been through the recovery, trips to the hospital, the injections She guided me through all of it.
Mellisa fought hard for me to keep my job and to make sure that the insurance company paid me my loss wages. Her loyalty and her witness holds no bounds, she really kept me going and gave me good advice.
As a client of Catalano Law I wouldn’t be where I am today without their help And guidance.
I’m grateful and owe a huge thanks to  Mellissa for not only being my lawyer and my right hand But a guardian and a friend. Catalano law The best in the business hands-down!!!.

Adam.L

reviews.text: Catalano Law firm and specially Peter J. Addonizio helped me a lot during a car accident claim. Their professionalism, open and constant communication resulted in an outstanding service and representation. 100% recommended.

From start to finish Peter Adonizio dis a fantastic job in settling my personal injury case. Always on top of everything and answered all my questions in a very timely manner. I recommend the Catalano Law Firm 100%. Thank you so much.

Understandably, it is hard to imagine that anyone searching for legal counsel is having the best day already. The idea of pursing a case can be difficult let alone ensuring you have the right legal team behind you can prove daunting. Finding myself in a similar situation I conducted multiple intake consultations with other firms but did not feel as assured as when I spoke with the Catalano team.

Due to my event occurring in the evening hours of a Friday I reached out presuming not to hear from anyone until Monday. I was reassured by the immediate 24/7 support and compassion from the intake rep. While recounting difficult details I felt heard and respected. Details were compiled and I soon met with Dominic whose candor and attention to detail would prove to make this ordeal painless beyond what I was already enduring.

Dominic’s honesty and advisement are invaluable. I initially informed him I was undecided and would need to weigh my options. Dominic was patient and wished me luck with my decision. Of all the law firms I spoke with, Dominic was the only one to warn me of puffery. It was not long after this I conclusively knew Catalano Law had my best interest at heart and would provide the best representation.

As the case moved forward I met with their investigators, spoke with my attorney, Dominic, and discussed our strategy. At no point did I feel decisions were being made for me, rather with me. The team was incredibly approachable and there were no “dumb questions” as at no point did I feel spoken down to. The firm was respectful of my wishes and input regarding the evidence and how I sought to proceed. Whenever a road lock appeared, Dominic was quick to keep me updated and aware of what our options were. Throughout my cases entirety, I felt I was apart of the whole process.

While I wish I met the members of the Catalano team under better circumstances, I am beyond thankful I was able to work with them.

TLDR:
For anyone with a personal injury case who may be on the fence of how to move forward, this firm is here to help you. Even though my case was based in Troy, NY communication was clear and consistent. It’s easy to throw high numbers out when discussing potential settlements. The team at Catalano Law has your best interest in mind and will represent you accordingly.

I just want to take a moment and thank everybody at Catalono Law firm for helping my sister and I in my mothers unfortunate demise... It's a definite final bitter sweet moment... Peter, you were available on a Sunday afternoon.. And you helped us tremendously with all your knowledge..Deniss you were right on top of things through the process and all the way to Sherri Strong delivering the settlement checks to my house.... I am truly thankful and I speak for my sister as well....

Incredible experience from start to finish. They took the time to sit down with me in my home immediately after an accident, and guided through every step of the process afterward. Felt like they were truly in my corner as an advocate, all throughout a multi-year struggle.

Will highly recommend their services to all, because Mellissa Murphy is an absolute gem! 💎👏🏻

I am very pleased with the care, concern and the professionalism by the group. Dominic, who handled my case was extremely great, especially in his patience and listening skills and discerning how to deal with my accident. Great job!
Melissa Murphy get 10+ stars she is wonderful, thank you for everything Melissa keep on Rockin!!!!

I first would like to Thank the entire Law firm for everything! Catalano Law indeed does their best !
A special thanks to Mrs.Murphy aka Melissa , she did a wonderful job since my injury checking in on me making sure i was receiving  the proper doctor care while she took care of things on the court side I felt more like a family member rather a stranger turned client ! She kept me updated throughout the process and explained all the steps they would take to maximize my settlement. She ended up getting me way more than usual she said. The whole process took about 10 months so keep in mind it’s not immediate. And where I can’t get back the time I lost with my son and running around with him and stuff, I’m happy to know I had Melissa and the rest of the Catalano team behind me every step of the way. 1000000000/ 10 would recommend!!

Pete Addonizio was absolutely amazing! He worked very hard to get me the best outcome possible and made sure to check in on me regularly as I was healing. The entire staff was very genuine and courteous and I would definitely use this law firm again, god forbid I ever need to in the future.
When I was referred to Peter they said, "If anyone can get you what you deserve, he can."  They weren't wrong. He made the impossible, possible.
the office staff was super knowledgeable, professional, courteous, dependable, reliable and their response time was immediate.  I highly recommend this law office for any legal needs!!!

in March 2023 I had the unfortunate experience of being T-boned going 55 mph.
Fortunately for me, I was driving my husband’s truck or I probably would’ve been killed. I have never sued anybody in my life,  I decided to call Catalano Law and see if I even had a case. They sent a gentleman to my home. He interviewed me and said they would take my case.
They first assigned and Attorney to my case to whom I didn’t get to talk  too much. I decided to call and ask a few questions and I had the honor of speaking with My old attorneys replacement Dominic Pompo.  I am very uneducated on how these things work. I had several thousand questions And Dominic answered every question and talk to me with Terminology I would understand. I felt so comfortable And connected with him. He answered every question and it didn’t matter if it was after hours. I tend to text a lot Rather than calling on the phone. He made me feel comfortable and totally satisfied after speaking or receiving a text back.
If I ever needed a law service again, I would go nowhere else, but too Catalano Law.
After a little over a year, I decided it was time to settle my case. I was so naïve. I didn’t know if I would get $5000. Or 100 thousand dollars. They sued for $175,000 And I came out a winner of $120,000.
It was a quick smooth process and Peter and Dominic, we’re both absolutely amazing.
You should never question Catalano laws ability to WIN!
A HUGE THANK YOU AGAIN TO DOMINIC FOR BEING SO COURTEOUS,, CARING AND KNOWLEDGEABLE.

Sincerely,
Geneen Taylor

About 2 years ago some personally things came about and I needed to find a family lawyer for a pretty serious custody battle. I went to speak to a few lawyers and was terrified at the cost I could potentially have to pay out. Galen came into my life unexpectedly,  but I am thankfully everyday for that occurrence. I was helping a woman and her and I started chatting more and more and we became kinda close over the next few weeks, after my last visit with a lawyer I felt defeated over whelmed and that was when my new friend reminded me of her profession and she had the perfect person for me to meet. She immediately gave me Galen's contact information and set up a time for him and I to meet. From the moment I meet Galen I was impressed. He handled my case with such care and  passion. He knew I was emotional, especially because this was a sensitive situation with custody. He listened to me and supported my decisions in what I wanted. We kept in constant contact, and Galen always answered me back with minutes or hours of emailing him. I am a firm believer that you need a lawyer who directly reflects you as a person. Galen was that person for me. He is smart, witty, funny, smart, stern and compassionate.  I know I paid him to be on my side, but it never ever felt like he was being paid to do his job. It truly felt like he was a fighter for me and my children because he believed in what I was trying to do. There is not enough words to express the gratitude I have for Galen. I now have complete sole custody of my 2 kids thanks to Him. Thanks Galen!

Galen is absolutely brilliant, kind, and has a gift that is needed in such a stressful situation.  He is a gentle giant who is consoling, yet professional in his practice.  He knows the law and is extremely personable.  If you need an intelligent attorney to represent you, I recommend Galen and this Law Firm.  You will not be disappointed in any way.

Having Emmett Nichols and Sandra Alrabaa taking a personal interest in my case and fighting for the best outcome which was a great help. Definitely pleased with the outcome. They are the team I’d recommend to anyone in need of dire help like I did. Really helpful, understanding and transparent. Thank you very much for all you both did in handling my case.

This took me a long time to write as the middle of November 2024 holds one of the worst days of my life, the day I made my worst mistake. I got into an accident, thankfully no one else was injured in the accident except myself.

After my accident I knew I needed to seek professional legal council. I contacted the office of DWI Tom Anelli, and I had an intake appointment, and shortly after was connected with Lawyer Jason Barringer. From the very first time I spoke with Jason, and explained exactly what had happened that day in November, and what led up to it he listened attentively, answered all my questions promptly, and never lied about the possible outcome of my case.

I explained to Jason the first time I spoke with him that I am a registered nurse, and I worked so hard to become one, and highly value my career helping others so I was very worried about repercussions to my nursing license depending on conviction. I had multiple court dates, 5 or 6 to be exact, and Jason took the time to speak with the DA and try to get me the best outcome possible. At first, it appeared there was only a sliver of hope to get the charges reduced. That didn’t stop Jason, he kept in contact with the DAs office and even Assistant DA to try to get another meeting to discuss my case.

In the end Jason got another meeting, another chance to represent me. His dedication, persistence, compassion, and knowledge as a Lawyer, and human being gave me the best gift I could have hoped for, a drastic reduction in my charges. reviews.text: I had William appointed to my case and I want to emphasize that he was extremely negligent with my case and that I got charged significantly for my first ever offense due to his complete lack of care and concern. He also barely took any time to speak with me, and seemed incredibly stressed, overwhelmed, and busy. The retainer fee was $5,000!! You would think for a fee that high and for your first ever minor offense that your lawyer would actually be able to make a difference in your case or possibly even reduce your charges… I understand that the outcome of a case is entirely dependent on your specific situation and circumstances, but he showed up multiple times very unprepared. I have heard stories from other individuals in similar recent situations who had significantly worse scenarios and who also did not have DUI specific lawyers appointed to their cases who had better results and outcomes than I did for less money. I sincerely feel as though I was blatantly ripped off by DUI Tom for the conclusion that came to be for me specifically. I wish that I could get some of my money back, as I was significantly impacted in several ways by my lawyer’s lack of due diligence. He wasn’t even able to successfully ask the judge for a conditional license for me!! I would never recommend this law firm to anyone, as I felt significantly neglected and overlooked and due to this I will be severely impacted for the rest of my life.

My nervousness disappeared as I sat with him in a large and comfortable conference room.  James told me what of the options available to me. He   took action filing a document to protect my rights as a plaintiff in a civil suit if my injury continued to plague me.   I’m confident I made the right choice of attorneys.  Oh, and I should say he gave me his valuable time for free.

reviews.ownerResponse: I am very sorry for your loss. I took your call personally and listened to you intently. I then tried to explain that NY has a terrible wrongful death law that dates back to the 1800s and severely limits what compensation can be collected when the person who died is retired and has no dependents. As I was taking the time to explain this, at no charge, you abruptly interrupted, insulted me and hung up. You didn't want to listen. Now you write a review falsely claiming that we won't help a person in need because they aren't rich?  Read about the Grieving Families Act that the Governor has vetoed twice and you may better understand. I have been a lawyer for 42 years and helped thousands of clients. Read our many 5 star reviews from the clients we did represent and who know us well. Also, we only get paid if the client gets paid and the fee always comes out of the settlement, never from the client. We don't accept clients based upon their wealth or status, but the merits of their claims.

There are not enough thanks to how much Craig and Hadisa have helped us, such an incredible team and I know if you get to work with them, they'll be just as efficient and kind.
Dreams do come true and without Craig and Hadisa none of this would have been possible. Thank you, we love you, Davey and John ❤

Working with Emilee Lawson Hatch was a wonderful experience. She and her team handled so many of the details of my sister-in-law’s estate. About three years later, Emilee worked to close my S-I-L Living Trust as well as working with a foreign attorney to settle foreign property ownership issues. That task took extreme patience and diligence and I compliment Emilee, Lisa Wendler, and Rachel Wadsworth for their organization skills in resolving the issue.
Emilee is a kind and caring person who loves her work and her clients.

Emilee Lawson-Hatch created a trust and end-of-life documents for me, and her service exceeded all expectations. Emilee consistently demonstrates a level of compassion that is rare to find in the legal profession. When we started planning, she took the time to understand my unique circumstances, patiently listening to my concerns and priorities. Her empathy shone through as she guided me through the intricacies of estate planning, making what could have been a daunting process feel surprisingly manageable.

What truly sets Emilee apart is her intelligence and thoroughness. It was evident that she possesses a deep understanding of estate law and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Every aspect of my trust and end-of-life documents was meticulously crafted, leaving no stone unturned. Her attention to detail gave me the confidence that my wishes would be carried out precisely as intended.

Throughout our interactions, Emilee exhibited not only a keen legal mind but also a genuine desire to serve her clients' best interests. She went above and beyond to ensure that I was fully empowered to make informed decisions about my estate. Her dedication to her craft and her clients is truly commendable.

I wholeheartedly recommend Emilee Lawson-Hatch to anyone in need of estate planning services. She is an exceptional lawyer who truly cares about her clients' well-being.

Emilee Lawson Hatch at Bousquet Holstein is the best attorney we have ever worked with. She is an expert in her field of elder law and estate planning. This is likely due to the fact that instead of just simply updating it like I had asked for, they scratched the entire thing and created a new one. My recommendation would be to ask them up front what the approximate cost will be prior as their attorneys all have different rates, some of which are much more than others. I would especially do this if you have used them in the past and are expecting a certain rate. This will prevent you from being blindsided like I was. I personally will look elsewhere going forward.

Received a traffic ticket in upstate NY, we knew the state trooper was in the wrong but he ticketed us anyways. We went on the Salina town court site and learned you can appeal traffic tickets via the Onondoga DA Office after pleading not guilty. On the DA Office website, there's a traffic ticket reduction request. We promptly filled it out with all necessary documentation. It took a couple of weeks before the DA Office sends you dispositions offering alternatives to your current ticket. The DA Office mistakenly wrote the same disposition for both tickets, so I called to ask for the second disposition. The issue with traffic tickets is they don't have anyone who can speak to you directly, you have to leave a voicemail. It took another week before the DA Office contacts back, and even then, all they told me was to wait. I repeated this the following week because there wasn't much time before I had to respond to the ticket. Turns out if you look at the disposition form there's someone who signs off on it. In this case it was the Assistant DA, Kali Benjovsky. I recommend you name drop whoever is on your disposition, that way the DA Office can get you in contact with them directly. After explaining my situation and providing more documentation, Kali addressed my tickets directly which was really nice. You can also find the DA staff emails on their website, so feel free to contact them directly rather than responding to the generic DA Office email. I'm glad I don't have to worry about the tickets anymore, so I figured I post this so other people can handle their tickets smoothly!

As a male victim of domestic violence, I never imagined that seeking justice and protection would make me feel like a burden. Unfortunately, my experience with District Attorney Buck has only deepened this sense of despair.

I've reached out to her office countless times, both by phone and in person, pleading for help and hoping for some kind of acknowledgment or support. But time and time again, I've been met with silence or, worse, indifference. It's incredibly disheartening to know that despite my efforts, my case seems to be swept under the rug.

I understand that the legal system is overwhelmed, but that doesn't justify ignoring those who are in desperate need of help. I never wanted to be in this position, and I certainly didn't expect to be treated as if my situation doesn't matter. This entire ordeal has left me feeling even more isolated and hopeless.

District Attorney  Buck's lack of response and care has added to the trauma I've already experienced. I urge anyone else seeking justice to be aware that you may face the same obstacles. It’s a sad reality when the very people who are supposed to protect you make you feel like your pain is insignificant.

I wouldn't even give them a star. They told me I'd hear about my property in evidence over a month ago and I haven't heard a single word. Stellar performance, I have doubts that they will even punish the criminal involved in the case I initiated. Good luck if you have to deal with them.
Loser don't care about the community of the middle class of syracuse
they are not helpful at all they make you wait for months and years as well for something and its not fair because there is alot of important things out there

I used Dana as an attorney being a first time homebuyer. She was extremely helpful throughout the whole process. She even was able to help me get money that was owed to me by the seller based on our contract that I had no knowledge of. She was very assertive but in a great way. Without her I don’t think I would’ve gotten it. I will definitely recommend her to family and friends or anyone looking! Thanks Dana!!
I have used Dana for my will as well as for realestate. I had great service at a fair price on every occasion.

I used Dana Grillo for a complicated sale of a house that I owned.  Luckily for me, Dana was assertive when warranted and I feel as though I got the best outcome.  I would recommend Dana to anybody that needs an attorney that is not afraid to fight for what is right.  She went above and beyond what many other attorneys would do.  I will be using her again.

Dana Grillo is a responsive, competant, and strong attorney. After my initial need for a Power of Attorney, I have since found myself depending on Ms. Grillo for additional help and guidance for various legal issues...a very good person to have in your corner.
Professional and efficient.  Pleasure to work with.
I called for legal advice concerning a civil matter and received very good advice that same day!
Professional, impeccable. Dana has represented me in two dealings thus far and I am 110% a satisfied customer.
Great lawyer. Thank you for your help

Highly recommended. Dana assisted with a real estate sale and provided excellent service. She was professional and explained each stage of the process clearly. Pricing was fair, I will definitely contact her again for any legal advice.

Dana saved me from the darkest time I have had in 42 years. Being falsely accused of something I did not do that could cost me my job and reputation. She goes above and beyond and is an amazing attorney!! Thank you Dana!!
Great Lawyer 🙂

Recently handled a Real Estate Sale for us.  Service was complete, accurate, and timely. Sold house without a realtor, and Dana and her assistant Sheri  handled all the legal details to guide us through the process seamlessly.
Extremely helpful with my real estate transaction, highly recommended.
Dana is a great attorney. She is very knowledgeable and friendly. Her fees are very fair.
Great Attorney,  easy to work with.
Starts and finish as promised at a reasonable price..
5 Star Law Firm in Syracuse. Dana will help with almost any of your Legal Needs. Highly recommended

Meet with her for a consultation. She did not sound as knowledgeable about the area of law I needed her for and she was more expensive than all other lawyers I talked to that were specialized in family law. It is worth it to meet with many lawyers before you choose one.
Want to thank Dana for the excellent work on my family case. She truly is exceptional and would recommend her law firm to anyone looking for representation. Thanks again and 5 Stars!

This review is late due to health challenges but the delay has not diminished the appreciation I have for David and litigation manager Karla Pavese. I had the good fortune to have their representation in a negligence procedure against a local rehab facility/nursing home where my wife was placed for a period prior to her death in 2021. Without exception, their efforts to seek redress for negligent care were sustained, vigorous and ultimately successful. They always exhibited the highest ethical standards, perseverance and compassion. Today I consider them to be not solely attorneys but valued friends. I am pleased to recommend their services !!
Dave Zukher said he would fight for me and that's exactly what he did. Thank you

David is amazing, very knowledgeable extremely professional and was able to get my charges dropped with a phone call. I was very impressed and so grateful for his outstanding work. Thank you so much for giving my life back.

Mr Zukher was court appointed and he has worked his butt off to get my case closed finally after a year and nine months. And that was not his fault it took so long either. And I appreciate the fact he came all the way out to Fabius to do it. Any time I called he always was great about calling me back and answering my phone calls. And making feel at ease. He doesn't talk down to you and is a straight forward person. He treats you like a friend and not a know it all. If you need a lawyer this is who you want. He will fight for you like no other Attorney  Will!

Five stars love these guys my honest opinion they are one of the greatest  Attorney teams in Upstate New York! These are the people that fight for the people, and they are amazing for it as a single father of three children. They are a wonderful addition to our village.!!!

i had david as my lawyer, he was fantastic, Super professional, and he got the judge to waive all of my charges!! if you need a lawyer, he is the best one, i'd probably be in jail without David!!! Thank you so much I'm so appreciative

David Zucker was my lawyer a few years back. When nobody believed in me he was there. It was a pro bono case and he ended up being my lawyer. It felt like everything was stacked up against me and I was losing everything. The first time we met I finally felt like things might be okay. This man believed me and fought for me every single time. I’ve had a lot of lawyers and when we were in the courtroom I sure was glad that he was on my side. David helped me through a troubling time then, and even though it’s been years now my life is still benefiting from how much he helped me. I want to personally thank David for helping me save my marriage and my family. I really couldn’t have done it without the help of God and you David. You slayed a Goliath in this case and I pray you slay many more. God bless you,
Joseph

I had David Zuhker as an attorney for a family court case. I dreaded the moment when I learned that I would be assigned to him, bc I’ve heard nothing but horrible things. As I started to communicate with Mr. Zuhker, I came to the conclusion that what I heard about him was in fact true. Every time I visited his office he was always smoking on a vape,  which I thought was very unprofessional. He would often  times deviate from dealing with my case and focus on how great of a person that he thought he was. In court, he would blurt out mendacious statements, leaving me confused. The judge had to warn him numerous times to watch his conduct. While talking to him he always spoke about him self, opposed to my case. Having him as a lawyer was a complete disaster! And I wouldn’t recommend him to anyone, ever!

David recently represented myself in family court and child support court. The process was extremely long but he made it as easy as possible. He is understanding of my situation and recommends what he would do to achieve the best possible outcome for myself and my daughter. He truly made me feel like family and that he had my best interest in mind. He does not just litigate to litigate.

David Zukher got an excellent outcome in a case for my son.  He was kind and compassionate while working with us.  He was always patient when explaining the legal system and his strategy in the case.  I am so happy that he represented my son.  I would highly recommend him to friends and family in need of a lawyer.
David is an amazing lawyer! He got the job done with and now I have a lawyer for life.

David it was an absolute pleasure working with you! You were truly God sent. Your credentials, expertise, and experience speak for themselves but your interpersonal qualities is really what sold me and provided me with the comfort and confidence in this situation. You're so down to earth, caring and compassionate, your professionalism and expertise alone are of course what you'd want and expect from your attorney but your personability and wonderful spirit was truly everything. Just an amazing human being, a rare beautiful soul who helped to restore my faith in humanity, truly! If you want excellent service, with all of the accolades , expertise and experience you'd want in am attorney but also someone with values and virtues who's going to treat you with the utmost care and respect, this is the man for the job! Just an amazing human being! I truly can't thank you enough. You were the difference between an awful experience and an amazing one. Thank you! 🩷
David is a compassionate and understanding guy .   He went out of his way to help my family and I. I am very greatful. Thank you for all you do 😊
Zuker is a common Eddy flum num

Great service!  I had the most ridiculous and unfair situation ever!  The lawyer i was going to use was aloof and I was referred to Mr. Zucker's office.  He believed me and put me in a position where being right was not wrong in the eyes of the law for once.  Thank you and your staff.  Karla is a rock star as well!

These lawyers are a great piece of mind they have helped a lot of people with accidents including myself I would recommend them for anyone's need of expert advice and representation in there tough times I'm very happy to have had them get me through my tough times I'm very happy to have them on my side thank you!!

I retained David Zukher for my case, and I could not be happier with the outcome. He is very knowledgeable in many areas of the law, and made me feel at ease from our first meeting. I highly recommend him as an attorney.
Right up front.
Wonderful attorneys. Highly recommended. They are very straightforward and professional. Thank Austin and attorney Zukher.
Excellent law firm. I highly recommend David Zukher, priced very fair. Did not charge me every time I called or texted him.

Attorney David zukher is the worst attorney that I have met. He charged myself 1500.00 to cover a Family Court case in where he has failed to present a defense in this matter. I had ask David to refund the monies that I had given to him as he only tried to work on this case for one half an hour.

He was told by myself to relieve himself.off the case as he did not protect the Court proceedings as I had explain to him of my  intentions on him filing motions that was necessary.  He has failed in every way possible. It appears to me that he does not know the simple basics of law.He had suggested that I plea to something that I did not do.

Beware of this attorney as I don't believe he is capable of representing anyone.
His failed actions has caused hardship upon this matter.

I can not say one bad thing about David.I can call him and he picks up on my first ring..He is outstanding at what he does..again yesterday I called him and on the first ring he picked up and saved my day..DAVID ZUKER is one of the nicest people I know..I have watch this man from the beginning of his career  to now and he has become one of the best lawyers I know..Honest and polite all of the above..If u need a lawyer he is ur best bet. Again I can't say anything bad about this gentleman..

Can’t thank David enough for his council and advise during my case. His no BS approach to resolving my matter has literally saved me 10’s, of thousands in the long term.  If 100 ⭐️ was an option, I would have selected that.

If you have a legal issue requiring resolution, don’t wait.  Call Dave NOW!  Can’t wait to shake this man’s hand the next time I’m in Syracuse!
He is professional, genuinely cares, and knows his stuff! Very experienced

David recently represented me in family court. He fought aggressively for what was rightfully owed to my children. His due diligence persevered and we had a great outcome. David cares about getting the right and fair outcome and cares even more for his clients. I highly recommend David for any of your legal needs!
Hands down best lawyer around. Nothing more to say about David

I’ve been involved with a good deal of community advocacy work in Syracuse, NY, most especially dealing with youth who are incarcerated and unable to afford private legal counsel. Though David Zucker, attorney at law, is by far, one of the best defense attorneys in Onondaga County, his generosity of service beyond his private practice, as a public defender, is beyond parallel. I just witnessed his advocacy for a family friend who is in desperate need of inpatient mental health services, but whose case required that a judge sign off on these services, to ensure both his eligibility and his admission to a program.

Dave worked tirelessly to acquire the best possible resolution for his client; he gained the cooperation of the district attorney, the plaintiffs, and his young client and was persistent with his efforts, despite the judge’s reluctance to sign the necessary documents. Dave even went so far as to retain a well-established psychiatrist to evaluate his young client’s mental health status and this meant carving out numerous additional hours away from his private practice services.

Clearly, it’s his devotion to the law, to the well-being of his clients, regardless of their financial status, and to the public safety of our community that drives his practice. I cannot recommend him highly enough because of his ethics, his expertise, and his professional dedication.

David Zukher is hands down the most caring and thorough lawyer in Onondaga County. He is my only recommendation for anyone looking for a lawyer who will treat you with the same love and compassion you would get from a close family member.
Dave is an excellent lawyer. He has helped me in a time of need and really come through for me on multiple occasions. He is dependable, attentive and very fair. I highly recommend this lawyer!

David recently represented me in a Family Court case and found him to be honest, fair, compassionate and was willing to go above and beyond to do what it took to make my grievances known before the Court.  He also did so without making promises he couldn’t keep.  He gave me a fair assessment of the law, what my options were, and allowed me to make a well informed decision on how to pursue the matter.  I greatly appreciate David for his assistance.  I would highly recommend him to anyone that needs legal representation.

David has done an excellent job in handling my son's case!
In all my years, I never thought I would be looking for a lawyer to help save my son's behind.
After the first 15 minutes speaking with David, I felt for the first time that everything could be ok.
David has been professional every step of the way and has gotten my son out of a BIG jam including the possibility of being incarcerated.
Also, I can't forget about the office staff, they are super and get the job done. A special shout out to Steve who has always been attentive, compassionate and extremely helpful during my phone calls to Davids office.

David is been a name known in our family for years. David and his colleagues have  done miraculously to successfully achieve what's been needed to be handled. I couldn't be more satisfied than I am with the way issues have been resolved. I highly recommend his services for those seeking to have a truly skilled  professional petition on their behalf.

David handled our case exceptionally without prejudice. David went above and beyond. We couldn't be more grateful to him. He was professional, he took the time to explain everything in great detail and answered all of our questions. Carla also did a wonderful job and is not afraid to do what needs to be done. We appreciate both of them. I would highly recommend David for any legal matters you have in front of you. You can expect swift justice.
David did an incredible job handling a legal matter for my family.  He was professional and very effective in achieving a favorable outcome.  I highly recommend him .  He went above and beyond.
Heather Vincent is an alright lawyer

Mr. David Zuhker, is amazing, and worth every cent! He has been my criminal defense attorney for four years, and I retained him for life!  Onondaga county sherrif dept. arrested me with seven felonies and six misdemeanors! David and his team prepared a habeas corpus to get me released from jail, because the d.a. was not ready for trial. Twenty four hours later I was released to my family!
Mr. Zuhker's team located on Warren st. in Syracuse, prepared for my upcoming trial while I stayed home, and NOT IN JAIL!  When we went to trial Mr. Zuhker ripped apart the d.a.'s prosecution and proved to the court that there was absolutely no evidence to convict me. Mr. Zuhker asked that all charges be dropped against me immediately,  and thats ezactly what happened! His knowledge of law is a broad spectrum of intelligence.  I'm now using him for family court ss well!! THANK YOU DAVID ZUHKER!!

I am writing this on behalf of one Mr. Zukher's clients....She asked to let anyone looking for a excellent attorney to know what his attributes are!...,He is honestadvocates for your rights, he is truthful and presents
Both negative and positive  aspects of your case. He is passionate and strives to right a wrong that has been done to you..He will not back down to opposition, and will fight for your rights.  He is definitely someone that you want in your corner.

David Zukher has represented me in criminal court also family court. He's been very proffesional
Very upfront and REALISTIC great attorney i'd use his services anytime
David got me great results at a difficult time in my life. I would absolutely recommend him to anyone looking for quality legal representation.
If you  need a lawyer please go here .they make you feel like you are important. They are the best .
Very good laywer
I just want to thank my attorney, David Zukher, so  much. Thank you for fighting to get my DWI dismissed. I am VERY thankful. Thank you so much.
David was an amazing lawyer. I could not have asked for a better turn out in my custody case. David got me everything that i asked for! I would recommend him to any of my family and friends!

David is an excellent lawyer and is highly competent in many different areas of law. I would strongly recommend him and he will do nothing but give you honest legal advice about whatever you need representation for. My results with David have been great and I continue to use him until this day.
Highly recommend handled my case very quick and it was painless. Very professional and would definitely use him again.

Laura was quick to assist me with getting my surgery scheduled.  She stayed  in contact with me throughout the entire workman compensation process. She frequently  checked in to see if I received information as promised, and always followed up. I would definitely use Laura Huffman in the future should the need arise.
Thank you Laura for your services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your review of my services.  I really appreciate your kind words and honest feedback.  I hope you will not need a workers’ comp attorney in the future but if you do, feel free to give me a call.  Take care!

reviews.text: Not happy with Ticket Doctor.   Needed help with speeding ticket.   Sue at Ticket Doctor kept delaying me.  Almost had license suspended.  Took care of situation myself.  Asked for refund.   Everytime I call, no return call.  No refund!

I can't say Enough about this Firm! From the first call with Sue She told me everything I need to know.The Ticket Doctor took care and got results with in 2 weeks! It all turned out perfect! And Sue is very professional and very Kind!! Go Ticket Doctor!! Give them a call if your looking for help on a ticket you received you will be Happy with the Out come!!
Nice law

Fabulous people. I received a speeding ticket, and the Ticket Doctor team graciously called me back the same day I sent in my inquiry and explained how the DA in the county where I was pulled over handled traffic violations. Instead of taking my money needlessly (when another attorney wanted to charge $550), they sent me to a link that explained exactly what I had to do to resolve the ticket. You can't put a price on that kind of honesty and genuine kindness, not to mention ethical practices. I hope to not cross paths with the Ticket Doctor again, but I am so grateful for my initial experience and will recommend the team to any family and friends who receive tickets!

I had an amazing experience with Ticket Doctor! Sue was extremely helpful! She helped reduce my speeding ticket and made the whole process really easy for me.  I really appreciate how fast and efficient she was, i recommend to anyone needing help with a  ticket!

Great service and results!! Sue was extremely helpful with answering my questions and moving my ticket process along quickly. We have used this service twice over the years now and I would highly recommend to anyone in need for this type of service. Thank you, Sue and team!
Very good

Go to literally anyone else. I paid them around $600 over a year ago, my ticket has been open for over a year, i now have yet another court date because they can't handle the simplest tickets. And I've called them multiple times and get told the same thing every time, I'll get a call back, have I? No.
Just got off the phone with her about a ticket I got from a camera she told me it straight just pay. super nice on the phone
The best that I know in the world

I’ve been coming to Lisa for many years and every time she has came through. She’s pleasant and very authentic, doesn’t tell you what you want to hear she gives it to you straight which I very much appreciate. She explores all options available to help even if there’s another way you can do it at a lower cost she gives you that option as well. Will continue to do business with her
Very personable and fast to process and get my ticket resolved! 10/10

The ticket doctor has handled several tickets for me. They are professional, quick, and cheap. They have successfully reduced two tickets for me, and today, they walked me through paying a moving violation. Lisa and Sue were both very nice on the phone and informative. I would highly recommend this for any ticket related matters.

The ticket doctor has helped me a few times and I have always been impressed with how easy and not stressful it was. Sue, one of the owners I believe, is very nice and helpful and easy to talk to. I recommend this company to all my friends and family that need assistance with a ticket.

reviews.text:
Shockingly poor and unprofessional service from all three people I worked with here when purchasing a home.

The person that was supposed to close on a home with me was on vacation on my close on/around date, and I never heard from her again.

We closed later than I had hoped to because of this.

The person that then took over for her wouldn’t respond to calls or emails for days at a time and when she did respond to some emails, would ignore half of the questions in the email.

The person who actually signed the documents with me was yet again someone else (who I believe owns the firm) and while I appreciate his help and we managed to close on the house, he didn’t seem to take it very seriously for something that is one of the most important purchases of someone’s life, and complained with the seller’s lawyer that they get paid less than the real estate agents involved, which I found a bit unprofessional (especially because my real estate agents did wayy more work in this process for me).

If they don’t think they’re getting paid enough, they should charge more rather than trying to minimize the time they spend on the process. I would have been happy to pay a bit more for better service.

I don’t mean any disrespect to any individuals here, I wish the best for them, and I don’t like to leave bad reviews for local businesses, but I can’t imagine how they could have done a worse job outside of I guess if the purchase literally didn’t go through.

While looking at their reviews for some other types of services, they may do a good job for those, but I would not recommend them for real estate.
Jonathan Karp goes above and beyond....a true professional. When it comes to his clients hes "All In"! He  Truely has his clients best interest at heart across the board.

I hired Karp Law Office to process my divorce case,  and it was the best decision on my life. The process was not stressful and case was closed in a shorter than average time. I am so greatful I went with Karp Law Office and Jonathan is  amazing in how he explains everything in great details because he understands that, his client's are not experienced and sometimes scared or confused.
Thank you Karp Law Office team for your amazing job.

Steven and Jonathan helped me with my recent divorce. They made the process as smooth and easy as I can imagine it being.

They take time to work with their clients, making sure their needs are met. While making sure everything is understood throughout the process. Definitely treating you like a person not just a client.

Certainly, I would use the Karp Law Office in the future for other legal needs. Whether that is real-estate, prenuptial agreements, or just general needs.
Steve is a straight up guy. I contacted him for some legal advice. No smoke and mirrors. He was forthright at no price.

Jonathan is the best attorney you could ever ask for I went throw a bad divorce and he was very helpful and went above and beyond to help me and my kids I would highly recommend him. I couldn't ask for a better attorney. My kids and I were so grateful to have him through the process.

Professional

After speaking with several via phone, I'm glad I connected with Jonathan. He doesn't sugarcoat anything, tells you how it is, and at heart is a kind and caring ally. I can't recommend him enough. I am grateful I found him.

Over the last few years I’ve engaged nearly a dozen attorneys with regards to real estate transactions, and working with the Karp Law Office was hands-down the best experience of them all.  First off, anyone at Steve’s office (himself included) were always a call away if I needed something, and that’s difficult to find in today’s world.  Furthermore, he and his staff were proactive throughout the entire process, always kept me informed, and handled any potential issue quickly/without my involvement.  It’s also rare to find a firm where everyone is on the same page 100% of the time, and again, the Karp Law Office delivered in that aspect as well.  This closing was the smoothest, most non-stressful experience I’ve had yet and I’d highly recommend Steve and his team for your real estate/legal needs!
Miserable human beings, do business elsewhere.
Completey unprofessional staff. Avoid at all costs.

I was looking for a law firm that would work with a veteran on a budget. Not only was Karp a good fit, they were great at answering all of my questions with informative responses. I highly recommend them and would do business with them again. Thank you Karp Law so much!

I had John Karp as a lawyer during a custody case with my ex. During this process there was a lot going on...I never once had a issue getting ahold of him, or one of the secretaries, who are wonderful women.  He took everything I said and used it in court, he also was very honest with things, wheather it was in my favor, but I appreciated the honesty! He led me down the right road, and had me take what steps was needed to get where we wanted in the court. He had the best patience and again with everything going on, and despite COVID happening, he fought hard and got me exactly what I wanted, for me and my son, and with that, I couldn’t of asked for a better lawyer! He really turned my life around and fought for my family! They are amazing and I highly highly recommend him as lawyer! Thanks again Karp law office!

This law office should not be in business! I wish we had looked at the reviews prior to choosing this office, as noted in a previous review this law office skimps out on actually completing the closing process! We went through hell trying to get a Satisfaction of Mortgage after closing on our property from the previous seller. Karp Law Offices closed out our title before actually obtaining this document which then caused a lean on our property. Fast forward to four years later when building on the property we were told that this document was missing. Karp Law Office refused to help get the document they were paid to get four years ago! So if you plan on using this office I would think again, if you want a headache and stress when you plan to sell or do anything with your property. You've been warned!

Used for estate...Extremely high priced, unprofessional in communication, shop around because you can find a lawyer for 1/3 of the cost. Not recommended.

Stephen Karp is a liar!   He will tell you what you want to hear just to steal your hard-earned money!   He told me he could help me but lost the case and then expected me to pay over $3,000 in leagal fees!   He is way too old.   Can’t remember what he even went into court for!   Stammering in court...never presented all the evidence we discussed!  Do yourself a favor and hire another attorney!   He has all his buddies on here giving him these “great” reviews because he has literally no clue what he’s doing and should have retired 10 years ago!

Price for service was extremely fair and reasonable, he was always quick to return my phone call and kept me updated every time there was cause. My wife and I cannot say enough to express our gratitude to Jonathan and his wonderful staff. I have found the attorney that I will be using for all my legal issues from here on.

I would highly recommend the Karp Law Offices for any legal work you may have.

I read a lot of online reviews of NY lawyers as I do not live in NY. I had decided to call two lawyers that I felt looked the best and make my decision based on how I felt after speaking with them. The first lawyer I called was out of town at the time. I will not give his name, but I will say that he is a top attorney in the NY area. I had already decided to retain George when I got a call from the first lawyer I mentioned asking if I still needed his help.  I told him that I did not as I had hired George. He then told me that he knew George well and that I was in good hands with him, I made a wise choice. He was not wrong.
I never actually met George we did everything over the phone. George was able to settle my case out of court so I can't speak to his abilities in a trial situation. That being said I have no reason to think that he would not be excellent. George is kind and understanding. He will make sure that you understand everything that you need to. He also makes himself available as much as possible by returning emails and calls very promptly.
I would very highly recommend George to anyone in need of and excellent defense attorney.

reviews.text:
I had a disappointing experience.

About two weeks ago, I spoke with the initial screening representative and was informed that I qualified for their services. Later, I received a letter asking me to call the office to verify my information, which I did promptly.

During that call, I was first told I should expect additional correspondence by mail. Shortly afterward, I was informed that they would not be taking my case and was advised to look for representation elsewhere. No clear explanation was provided as to what changed.

As a retired, disabled veteran seeking legal assistance, this was frustrating and discouraging. I understand that law firms have the right to accept or decline cases, but clearer communication and transparency would have gone a long way. Being told you qualify, asked to verify information, and then declined without meaningful explanation is not an easy experience, especially for someone reaching out for help.

Based on this experience, I was disappointed, particularly given the firm’s reputation and stated commitment to serving the veteran community.

I wish them well, but I hope future clients, especially veterans, receive clearer guidance and communication.

I was very disappointed with my experience with OOT and associates on how they handled my disability process.
I was never able to talk with, or meet with,  the attorney until the day of the hearing in which we had about three minutes to discuss things. Per his assistant, that’s not how they work things as far as meeting with the attorney.
My case was declined, which was surprising as the attorney said he doubted I would be declined.
I was told an appeal was filed and to wait patiently up to 18 months. When I contacted the disability office, they had never received any appeal information. According to the person assisting the attorney she had proof that it had been filed. I continued to wait patiently, to call on occasion, and still the same message that it had been filed.
I looked into trying again with a different lawyer  but according to disability too much time had passed, and I didn’t have enough recent Work credits to open a new case.

I reached out to Cherundolo Law Firm regarding a potential medical malpractice case. Although I understand that law firms have to assess cases based on financial feasibility, I was disappointed by how quickly mine was declined, not because of the merits of what happened to me, but based on whether the outcome would “offset the time and expense” of litigation.

What I went through was real. The physical trauma, emotional exhaustion, and lasting impact on my life, especially as a mother, deserve acknowledgment. I didn’t expect guarantees, only an honest attempt to stand beside someone who has been through harm. Instead, the response felt like another system turning away from women who are trying to be heard.

While their decision may not reflect their opinion about the care I received, it highlights a flaw in the system: too often, the depth of a woman’s pain is measured in dollars, not dignity.

I’m speaking up not to change their mind, but because every “claim” is a real human story. And mine deserves to be seen.
He's great lawyer

reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Jenkins, I missed court due to the death of father and I was then out of the country on my honeymoon.

You had been in touch with my office. In fact, they scheduled a meeting for us to talk on Friday, 12/15/23. You received an initial letter from us when we were assigned, and you were sent updates regarding court dates and times.

When you called, despite my staff having been nothing but courteous and accommodating to you, you berated them for having to be placed on hold, and when you spoke to immediately began yelling at me that I was not fighting you, and chiding me for the absences explained above. When I simply read to you what was stated in the report, you then began to yell at me.

To make sure you got the best results, I asked the court to relieve me today and you were assigned a new attorney.

You never hired me, I was assigned and while that makes no difference as to the service I provide each client, it is quite awful of you to come after my livelihood when I was representing you at the behest of the Courts.

Good luck in the future.

reviews.text: I am a victim of a used car scam, and NYS DMV scam, the Legal Aid Society is not funded in Otsego County, NY, so the one in Binghamton, NY referred me to the Syracuse, NY office.  They are friendly, but not very helpful at all.  Spent several days waiting to speak to an attorney only to find out they do not handle elder abuse cases with seniors like me being scammed out of a car in a rural area and bothered by predatory banks and lousy DMV, and they do not handle many types of civil cases and do not give referrals.  It is like a rigged system where they purposefully do not give legal help and do the scams at the same time.  My retirement is being ruined by scams and no legal services.  I look forward to moving with my dogs elsewhere.  Feel trapped by NYS, feel it is intentional due to my being a mixed race minority, senior, small business owner.

7/18/2024, this place is still worthless.

Called again today and guess what?  There are NO lawyers who handle my type of case.  LOL, yeah, they give aid to themselves and nobody else.  I give them a score of ZERO, and if I could I'd give them a negative number.  The people who gave them good reviews must work there.  JOKE OF A PLACE!

Previous:  Where are they when people ACTUALLY need them?

Pretty worthless.  The lawyer I needed was supposedly busy until July, yet the lady on the phone refused to make an appointment for me for July.  Guess you get what you pay for (meaning NOTHING.)
Very unprofessional. Communication very very poor. Didn't even call back to tell me if they could or couldn't take my case. They called the day if court asking what I needed help with etc......
They have done any and everything in their power to help me win my Social Security cases!! I feel very blessed to be working with them!
Not helpful at all. Do not return phone calls.
Help
Great place for a Lawyer
Customer service skills could be improved. The way they speak to individuals who call at times is unbelievably rude.

I had called to get help for a civil matter.
I got a call from Ester Wagner
Who spoke with me. I went into details about the case.she asked me to provide her the documents. I rented a car from binghamton to get her the documents. It was a serious matter and I needed her to help me understand and direct Me. she agreed to help me handle the case
We spoke multiple times on the phone..so when I trusted her with my paperwork I thought she would at least call me like she did before..the following week I called to see if she gone trough it. After leaving her a voice message she sent an email saying she needed to read it
2 weeks, she decided to write me an email  her question why did you want me to read your document? In owe I thought she may had confused me with someone else...then she wrote..my firm doesn't not handle this type of case.
She ask me about the case, for 30minutes we spoke on the phone about the case. She asked me to send it to her.
A month has gone by.she still has my documents and according to her. She didn't know what I wanted. A complete waste  of my time...
does not handle this type.
Unbelievable. She was beyond careless. I said if your firm doesn't handle this type why did you ask to have me send the paper work after we spoke 3imes? Why are you still holding on to the documents. you could had the decency to call me...as she knew I was waiting for answers.
She is useless. If you don't know what to do about a civil case as a lawyer..hummm..which wasn't the case. She neglected my documents and needed  an excuse.
She was so negligent...I still don't believe her incompetence.
It
.
They did provide a service, but they returned my call which to me is very important.
Responded as quickly as they could because of pandemic and alot of calls. Within a week
Received call after 7pm the lady was rude, assumptive and seemed in a big hurry and was not listening to me and began to assert I had no case, all in less than 5 minutes. I hung up
Very understanding people
Great atmosphere and food.
Did an amazing job, I'm a Canadian and Robert took care of every step of my speeding ticket from New York, extremely communicative and helped me rest easy.
Fantastic service. Robert was patient, attentive, and prompt through every step of the way.
Got my case dismissed when falsely accused of being at fault for an accident which totaled BOTH vehicles!

As a Canadian citizen, I want to thank Robert and his team for doing a great job on my son`s speeding ticket and get it reduced to a non moving violation ticket. Which saved him on demerit points and insurance premiums. Fantastic job. I recommend his law firm no questions asked.
Shows up late wherever he goes. Completely irrational. Find a different traffic lawyer.

I am a Canadian citizen who was caught speeding in upstate New York. I am unfamiliar with how traffic courts operate in New York and I wanted professional assistance answering the charges brought against me. I contacted Robert and we discussed my situation. My main concern was preserving my otherwise spotless driving record and avoiding any increase in my insurance premiums. Imagine my elation when his secretary Carol sent me the following message:

"Bob was able to get your 4-point ticket reduced to a no-point, non-moving violation, which is also no-demerit points.  Your Ontario license and insurance premiums will not be affected."

Bob and Carol are friendly, empathetic people; they told me to put my mind at ease and let them do their job. I highly recommend Sinesi Law - thank you Robert & Carol!

We used Mr. Thompson from the original closing of our house and the title work in 2016 over a four year period. The staff were very pleasant and there were no errors in the paperwork. My two concerns:
1.Communication was very poor. We never received updates or needed information unless we were the ones to initiate the conversation. Literally, over 4 years, we never received an uninitiated email or phone call. Made us feel like this wasn’t important.
2.There was an issue with the original home’s title that caused us to put money into escrow. Mr. Thompson was the attorney we paid to close on our house and resolve this issue. The resolution took 4 years. I do believe it was challenging to get it completed as he repeatedly stated he was having paralegals and interns from his office working on it, but every time I called for an update, I would receive some sort of general assurances that they were very close to getting it sorted, they found someone who knew where the information was, etc. 4 years seems a bit excessive. Ultimately, throughout the process, we never felt like this was a priority.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I do want to provide some clarification for anyone reading this review in the future.
Our office did not handle your original closing or the title work that led to the escrow issue. The matter you are referring to was taken on as a courtesy to help resolve an error created by a different attorney several years earlier. Because it involved third-party title records and events outside of our control, the timeline was unfortunately dependent on outside agencies and prior documentation that took significant time to track down.
Even so, we understand how frustrating that delay must have felt, and I’m glad we were ultimately able to resolve the issue so the escrow could be released.
While this was not a standard attorney-client engagement, we always appreciate feedback, and we remain committed to timely communication and diligent follow-through on all matters handled directly by our firm.

reviews.text:
The firm took me on as a client in May 2025 regarding a misdemeanor traffic ticket and it is still not resolved. Even worse, I stopped hearing from them altogether.

My attorney is Alex Fischer, but initially Anna handled all our exchanges and kept me informed in a timely manner. She left the firm sometime in July (which I had to find out from Alex). I last spoke with Alex on the phone in July and there's been no word since then. It's now almost November of 2025, I have received no updates on my case, Alex will not respond to my emails, and their front office cannot find anything on my file. Today I received a notice of failure to comply from the DMV. Not sure why I'm experiencing this, as the firm has glowing reviews, but perhaps a traffic matter is too small in the eyes of real estate attorneys. If someone from this firm is reading this review, please get in touch with me.

The real estate process can be a rather tedious and overwhelming process, but Hill & Fischer takes the anxiety out of it.

Mr. Seth, Mr. Alex, Mr. Jon and the rest of his staff treat you like family, never a file folder in his cabinet. When you call they don’t have to try and figure out who you are every time you call. That’s a lot of relief. They know what they’re  doing and guide you accordingly in your compliance and making sure the other side is in compliance also AND ON TIME! That’s a biggie for me.

I had the privileged honour of occupying both ends of the service spectrum with Hill & Fischer, first as a buyer in 2021 and a seller in 2025. In 2021 we were Florida buyers new to Syracuse and new to New York. We knew nothing! But Hill & Fischer helped us and we were able to experience our NY dream. Now in 2025, as a seller of said home. I’m really glad we didn’t have to reinvent the wheel again because we were familiar, the house was familiar… a match made in heaven. Thanks to their guidance once again. Seriously!

The purchase was easy and the sale much easier even with me sending enails on a Sunday and expecting a reply on Monday morning. Imagine my surprise when Mr. Seth responded on Sunday! I remember reading the email thinking … it’s Sunday... But this is Hill & Fischer, not your ordinary real estate attorney. 😊

This is a company of professional integrity for themselves and their clients.

So I will never use anyone else. I can never use anyone else.

My next upcoming purchase, Hill & Fischer will be my real estate attorney and every time again after that because I know it will be a honest and legal transaction. Stress free!

God bless and thank you sir and your office team for the great work you do. You’re very much appreciated.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you, so much, Lana.

Such a really nice review.

We feel the same way about you as a client.

Seth

Returning from a bicycle ride one Saturday afternoon, I was hit from behind by the driver of a SUV who tried to pass me on the left as I was making a left hand turn into my driveway.  Fortunately, the crash was low speed and my injuries were mostly road rash.  Although my new bike did not sustain frame damage, its components and saddle were badly scraped as well.  After cleaning  up, I gathered my bike and took it to the local shop from where it was purchased.  The bike shop owner took one look at my bandaged body and asked, "Do you have a lawyer?"  When I responded no, he immediately gave me Ben's number to call, explaining that no one should try to navigate the insurance company claim process for a bicycle accident without one.  He was absolutely right.  Ben took control of the claim process, fighting with the insurance company to get me enough money to not only fix my bicycle, but also compensation for scarring from the road rash.  I would recommend Ben's services to anyone accident victim.
