I highly recommend David Hammond at CDH Law as a criminal defense attorney. David worked with me on a particularly challenging legal matter, and I can say with full confidence that he is not only a highly skilled legal professional but also someone who brings compassion, integrity, and dedication to every case. David and his team took the time to clearly explain every step of the legal process, answered all my questions thoroughly, and ensured that I was informed and prepared throughout my case. He was always honest and realistic yet, remained optimistic and determined in pursuing the best possible outcome. Thanks to David’s efforts, my case was resolved far more favorably than I had anticipated. I am incredibly grateful for the support and advocacy CDH Law provided during such a difficult time.

If you are in need of a criminal defense attorney who is knowledgeable, trustworthy, and genuinely invested in their clients’ well-being, I strongly recommend David Hammond without hesitation.

I was arrested for pulling a gun on a woman in traffic. I was completely innocent of the crime. I had a warrant for my arrest and attorney Brian Tedd was there With me to turn myself in and he was at the two court appearances. This is the first time I had a lawyer that cared. The best way I can explain it is that it was like having your dad there in court with you. He was able to show a video in court proving my innocence. He got me released on my own recognizance and argued in court to have my case dismissed. His argument was nothing short of Amazing. My case was completely dismissed even when the DA wanted to try to take me to Trial.
Came back to add this… I never had to worry of Brian was going to show up to court while I was in county jail. He answered my call from jail and reassured me he was showing up to court. I didn’t have to spend my time being nervous or scared and this is the FIRST time I could say to myself. “I have a lawyer on my side that’s actually cares what happens.” Like I said. It felt like having your dad as your lawyer. You know you were ok. Never had that confident feeling before.
Brian hope you see this. Thanks dude.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Andrew.  It sounds like you are disappointed and insulted that our firm was unable to take on your matter.  Unfortunately, we are unable to accommodate every request that comes into our office, but we can assure you it has nothing to do with your sexual orientation or disability.  While certainly the ability to pay legal fees may impact our ability to take on your case, we in fact have a strong record of advocating for indigent clients, and we can assure you that your indigency played no part in our assessment that your legal goals were unattainable.  We also have a strong record of advocacy for the LGBTQ community, thus the allegation that this sort of unacceptable discrimination had anything to do with our rejection of your case is demonstrably false. We categorically reject your conclusion that our "tone changed" upon a discussion of your financial ability, sexual orientation, or disability.  We wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text:
Now let me start off this genuinely honest review with why I am a bit upset. The price. $200-$300 for a traffic ticket may not be a lot to you but to a college student and military veteran it is! The main reason it got dismissed was because it was addressed right before the New Year. I also had the same exact charge for another traffic ticket but in another county and brought it to a different lawyer of mine and it got dismissed on the same exact day as this one right before New Years. Same time, same result but only for $100. The judges and court system does this as a way of helping the people and cut us a break for major holiday's like that.
Now before some completely ignorant and ill informed person attempts to discredit and accuse me lying about that fact, a local 30 year career JUDGE TOLD ME that directly.
Overall, The lawyers are informative, helpful and direct but the price is absolutely ridiculous for traffic tickets.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. We are happy you find our lawyers informative, helpful, and direct, and that we got your ticket dismissed.
